assertions.title: QEMU display renders correctly after refactoring

steps.action: Launch QEMU with virtio devices, 9p filesystem, RTC
steps.observed: QEMU booted, all 5 virtio devices discovered, 4 SMP cores online, display pipeline running

steps.action: Wait 8s for full boot and display pipeline initialization
Send keystrokes: h, e, l, l, o via monitor socket
steps.observed: Keystrokes sent with 0.1s delays, all accepted

steps.action: Convert PPM to PNG and view with Read tool
steps.expected: Title bar with document name and clock, typed text with cursor, proper font rendering
steps.observed: Title bar shows document icon + 'Text' label, clock shows '14:01:13', typed text 'hello' visible with cursor after it, clean monospace font rendering for content, proportional font for title bar

evidence.consoleErrors: none — serial log shows clean boot with no panics, errors, or warnings

steps.action: Boot kernel in QEMU with full display pipeline
steps.expected: All pipeline components start: input driver, text editor, core, compositor, GPU driver
steps.observed: Serial log confirms: virtio-input ready (x2), text-editor starting, compositor starting, core starting, font rasterized, SVG icon rasterized, display pipeline running, entering render loop

steps.action: Type 'hello' via QEMU monitor sendkey commands
steps.expected: Characters flow through pipeline: input → editor → core → scene graph → render backend → framebuffer → GPU → display
steps.observed: Typed characters 'hello' appear on screen in correct order with proper font rendering

steps.expected: Screenshot shows typed characters on display
steps.observed: Screenshot shows 'hello' with cursor, title bar, clock — full display pipeline functional

steps.action: Check serial log for panics or errors
steps.expected: No panics, no errors, no crashes
steps.observed: Serial log is clean: boot sequence completed normally, all components initialized, no error messages, no panics

evidence.consoleErrors: none — full serial log reviewed, no panics or errors found

summary: Tested 2 assertions: 2 passed. QEMU display renders correctly with title bar (document icon + 'Text'), clock (14:01:13), typed text ('hello'), cursor, and proper font rendering. Serial log confirms clean boot with all pipeline components operational. End-to-end rendering pipeline (input → editor → core → scene graph → render backend → framebuffer → GPU → display) is fully functional after refactoring.
